  5. Short Form Hooks

Short-Form Video Hooks

TikTok, Reels, and Shorts hooks optimized for viral engagement

Short-Form Video Hooks

Ready-to-use hooks for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

Platform Overview

PlatformOptimal LengthBest Practices
TikTok15-30sText overlay mandatory, 3-5 hashtags
Instagram Reels15-30s10-15 hashtags, sticker engagement
YouTube Shorts30-60sKeyword-rich titles, #Shorts required
Facebook Reels30-60sStorytelling captions, 5-10 hashtags

Posting Schedule

  • TikTok: 6-9AM, 12-2PM, 7-11PM
  • Instagram Reels: 9-11AM, 1-3PM, 7-9PM
  • YouTube Shorts: 12-3PM, 5-9PM
  • Facebook Reels: 1-4PM, 7-9PM

Category 1: Frustration Validation Hooks

Hook 1.1: The App Hell Nightmare

Text Overlay: “POV: You have 7 apps just to turn on your lights”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:03) POV: You have 7 apps just to turn on your lights.
(0:03-0:07) Nest for climate. Ring for security. Hue for lights. August for locks...
(0:07-0:12) I spent $3,000 on smart home stuff and I'm MORE stressed.
(0:12-0:15) Until I found this. One app. Everything. [HeyZack reveal]

Music: Chaotic beat → sudden calm
Hashtags: #SmartHome #TechFail #HomeAutomation #SmartHomeTips

Hook 1.2: The 2 AM False Alarm

Text Overlay: “Another false alarm. It’s 2 AM. Again.”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:04) Another false alarm. It's 2 AM. Again.
(0:04-0:08) It's my cat. For the 40th time this week.
(0:08-0:12) I'm paying for security that won't let me sleep.
(0:12-0:15) So I switched to AI that actually learns. [Peaceful sleep scene]

Music: Tense alarm → peaceful ambient
Hashtags: #SecuritySystem #FalseAlarm #SmartHomeFail #HomeSecurityTips

Hook 1.3: The Energy Bill Shock

Text Overlay: “My energy bill went from $140 to $210… but WHY?”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:03) My energy bill went from $140 to $210.
(0:03-0:07) I replaced every bulb. Got a smart thermostat. Nag my kids constantly.
(0:07-0:11) Still climbing. Because I had NO IDEA where the money was going.
(0:11-0:15) Then I installed this. [Energy dashboard reveal]

Music: Suspenseful build → satisfying resolution
Hashtags: #EnergyBill #SaveMoney #SmartHome #EnergySavingTips

Category 2: Before/After Transformation

Hook 2.1: Morning Routine Chaos vs. Calm

Text Overlay: “Before HeyZack vs. After HeyZack”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:07) BEFORE: Running around turning off lights, checking locks...
(0:07-0:10) AFTER: "Hey, I'm leaving." [Everything adjusts]
(0:10-0:15) My house finally got smart. [Walk out door]

Hook 2.2: The Evening Transformation

Text Overlay: “One command. Everything changes.”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:05) 6 PM. I get home. Garage opens automatically.
(0:05-0:10) Lights adjust. Thermostat pre-set. TV on my show.
(0:10-0:15) It learned Friday = movie night. I never programmed that.

Category 3: Energy Bill Reveals

Hook 3.1: The Bill Drop

Text Overlay: “I saved $47 this month. Here’s how.”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:03) My energy company hates me now.
(0:03-0:08) [Show before/after bill comparison]
(0:08-0:12) $47 saved. Didn't change a single habit.
(0:12-0:15) AI did the work. Link in bio.

Hook 3.2: The Energy Vampire Hunt

Text Overlay: “Found the reason my bill was $240/month 😤”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:04) Energy app shows real-time usage by room.
(0:04-0:08) Basement: 40% of my bill. A BEER FRIDGE.
(0:08-0:12) Bad seal. Running 24/7. Costing me $80/month.
(0:12-0:15) Fixed it. Bill dropped instantly.

Category 4: Setup Time-Lapses

Hook 4.1: The 30-Minute Challenge

Text Overlay: “30 minutes. Entire smart home. No electrician.”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:05) [Time-lapse: unboxing and installing sensors]
(0:05-0:10) [App setup on phone]
(0:10-0:15) Done. 30 minutes. My whole house is smart now.

Category 5: B2B Hooks

Hook 5.1: The Service Call Nightmare

Text Overlay: “Property managers: Why are you paying $200/hour for THIS?”

Script (15s):

(0:00-0:04) Tenant calls: "It's too hot."
(0:04-0:08) Old way: Schedule $200 service call. Wait 2 days. 1-star review.
(0:08-0:12) HeyZack way: Open app. Adjust. Text confirmation.
(0:12-0:15) 90 seconds. Problem solved.

Success Benchmarks

Viral Goals

  • 10+ hooks achieving >100K views
  • 3+ hooks achieving >500K views
  • 1+ hooks achieving >1M views
  • 4%+ average engagement rate

Conversion Goals

  • 50K+ waitlist signups
  • 5K+ weekly link clicks
  • 500+ weekly DM inquiries
